  var pvData = {"source":"Direct","referrer":"Direct","visitor_type":"logged out","visitor_login_status":"logged out","visitor_id":0,"page_title":"Home - SolutionPoint Behavioral Health - SolutionPoint | Mental Health & Addiction Treatment in Palm Springs","post_type":"page","post_type_with_prefix":"single page","post_categories":"","post_tags":"","post_author":"jerfalco","post_full_date":"February 7, 2017","post_year":"2017","post_month":"02","post_day":"07","is_front_page":1,"is_home":1,"search_query":"","search_results_count":0};
  var body = {
    url: encodeURIComponent(window.location.href),
    referrer: encodeURIComponent(document.referrer)
  };

  function makePostRequest(e,t){var n=[];if(t.body){for(var o in t.body)n.push(encodeURIComponent(o)+"="+encodeURIComponent(t.body[o]));t.body=n.join("&")}return window.fetch?new Promise(n=>{var o={method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"},redirect:"follow",body:{},...t};window.fetch(e,o).then(e=>{n(e.text())})}):new Promise(t=>{var o;"undefined"==typeof XMLHttpRequest&&t(null),(o=new XMLHttpRequest).open("POST",e,!0),o.onreadystatechange=function(){4==o.readyState&&200==o.status&&t(o.responseText)},o.setRequestHeader("Content-type","application/x-www-form-urlencoded"),o.send(n.join("&"))})}
  function observeAjaxCartActions(e){new PerformanceObserver(function(t){for(var n=t.getEntries(),r=0;r<n.length;r++)["xmlhttprequest","fetch"].includes(n[r].initiatorType)&&['=get_refreshed_fragments', 'add_to_cart'].some(p => n[r].name.includes(p))&&fetchCart(e)}).observe({entryTypes:["resource"]})};

  function fetchCart(adapter) {
    makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=cartData", { body })
      .then((response) => {
        var data = JSON.parse(response);
        setCartData(data, adapter);
      })
  }

  function setCartData(cartData, adapter) {
    Object.keys(cartData.avs).forEach((key, value) => {
      adapter.attr(`wp_${key}`, cartData.avs[key]);
    })
  }

  function setAssocData(assocData, adapter) {
    Object.keys(assocData).forEach((key) => {
      adapter.attr(`wp_${key}`, assocData[key]);
    })
  }

  var RuleHandler = {
    hasVisitorCartRules: (campaignMeta) => {
      return !!(campaignMeta.rules.visitorCart || campaignMeta.rules.visitorCartRevamp || campaignMeta.rules.visitorCartV3);
    },
    hasVisitorAttributeRule: (campaignMeta) => {
      return !!campaignMeta.rules.visitorAttribute;
    }
  }

  document.querySelector('html').addEventListener('optimonk#embedded-campaigns-init', function(e) {
    var campaignsData = e.parameters;

    if (!campaignsData.length) {
      return;
    }

    var adapter = window.OptiMonkEmbedded.Visitor.createAdapter();
    var hasCartRule = false;
    var hasAttributeRule = false;

    campaignsData.forEach((campaignMetaData) => {
      hasCartRule = hasCartRule || RuleHandler.hasVisitorCartRules(campaignMetaData);
      hasAttributeRule = hasAttributeRule || RuleHandler.hasVisitorAttributeRule(campaignMetaData);
    });

    setAssocData(pvData, adapter);

    if (hasCartRule) {
      observeAjaxCartActions(adapter);
      fetchCart(adapter);
    }

    if (hasAttributeRule) {
      makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=productData", { body })
        .then((response) => {
          var data = JSON.parse(response);
          setAssocData(data, adapter);
        })
    }
  });

  document.querySelector('html').addEventListener('optimonk#campaigns_initialized', function () {
    if (!OptiMonk.campaigns) {
      return;
    }

    var adapter = window.OptiMonk.Visitor.createAdapter();

    setAssocData(pvData, adapter);

    if (OptiMonk.campaigns.filter(campaign => campaign.hasVisitorAttributeRules()).length) {
      makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=productData", { body })
        .then((response) => {
          var data = JSON.parse(response);
          setAssocData(data, adapter);
        });
    }
  });
}());

let hasCampaignsBeforeLoadTriggered = false;

document.querySelector('html').addEventListener('optimonk#campaigns-before-load', () => {

    if (hasCampaignsBeforeLoadTriggered) return;
    hasCampaignsBeforeLoadTriggered = true;

    function setAssocData(assocData, adapter) {
        Object.keys(assocData).forEach((key) => {
        adapter.attr(`wp_${key}`, assocData[key]);
        })
    }

   function triggerEvent(element, eventName, parameters) {
        let event;
        if (document.createEvent) {
            event = document.createEvent('HTMLEvents');
            event.initEvent(eventName, true, true);
        } else if (document.createEventObject) {
            event = document.createEventObject();
            event.eventType = eventName;
        }

        event.eventName = eventName;
        event.parameters = parameters || {};

        if (element.dispatchEvent) {
            element.dispatchEvent(event);
        } else if (element.fireEvent) {
            element.fireEvent(`on${event.eventType}`, event);
        } else if (element[eventName]) {
            element[eventName]();
        } else if (element[`on${eventName}`]) {
            element[`on${eventName}`]();
        }
    };
    
    var adapter = OptiMonkEmbedded.Visitor.createAdapter();

    var orderData = null;
    

    if (orderData) {
        setAssocData(orderData, adapter);
    }

    console.log('[OM-plugin] visitor attributes updated');

    console.log('[OM-plugin] triggered event: optimonk#wc-attributes-updated');
    triggerEvent(document.querySelector('html'), 'optimonk#wc-attributes-updated');

});

if (window.WooDataForOM) {
    console.log('[OM-plugin] varibles inserted (window.WooDataForOM)');
}

            .nectar-pulsate i {
              display: block;
              border-radius: 200px;
              background-color: currentColor;
              position: relative;
            }
            .nectar-pulsate i:after {
                display: block;
                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                left: 50%;
                content: "";
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                margin: -50% auto auto -50%;
                -webkit-transform-origin: 50% 50%;
                transform-origin: 50% 50%;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background-color: currentColor;
                opacity: 1;
                z-index: 11;
                pointer-events: none;
                animation: nectar_pulsate 2s cubic-bezier(.2,1,.2,1) infinite;
            }

            @keyframes nectar_pulsate { 
                0% {
                    opacity: 0.6;
                    transform: scale(1);
                }
                100% {

// CTM Session Tracking and Duplicate Prevention
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Function to get CTM session ID
  function getCTMSessionId() {
    try {
      if (typeof __ctm !== 'undefined' && __ctm.tracker && __ctm.tracker.getSessionId) {
        return __ctm.tracker.getSessionId();
      }
      // Fallback: try to get from localStorage or generate a unique ID
      let sessionId = localStorage.getItem('ctm_session_id');
      if (!sessionId) {
        sessionId = 'ctm_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
        localStorage.setItem('ctm_session_id', sessionId);
      }
      return sessionId;
    } catch(e) {
      console.log('CTM session tracking error:', e);
      return null;
    }
  }
  
  // Add session ID to all CF7 forms
  const cf7Forms = document.querySelectorAll('.wpcf7-form');
  cf7Forms.forEach(function(form) {
    const sessionId = getCTMSessionId();
    if (sessionId) {
      // Add hidden input for session ID
      let sessionInput = form.querySelector('input[name="ctm_session_id"]');
      if (!sessionInput) {
        sessionInput = document.createElement('input');
        sessionInput.type = 'hidden';
        sessionInput.name = 'ctm_session_id';
        form.appendChild(sessionInput);
      }
      sessionInput.value = sessionId;
      
      // Set cookie for server-side access
      document.cookie = 'ctm_session_id=' + sessionId + '; path=/; max-age=3600';
    }
  });
});
</script><script type='text/javascript'>

Home - SolutionPoint Behavioral Health - SolutionPoint | Mental Health & Addiction Treatment in Palm Springs

 Press enter to begin your search 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Close Search 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
We transform lives.

 

 

Addiction Treatment &
 
 

 

Mental Health Treatment
 
 

 

in Palm Springs
 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 Call for Outpatient Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 Call for Residential Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 Call for Mental Health Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 Call for Outpatient Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 Call for Residential Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 Call for Mental Health Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Know This First

 

 
Our mental health and addiction treatment is grounded in integrity, delivered by experts who lead with experience, ethics, and heart.

 

You deserve more than promises—you deserve a proven team. At SolutionPoint, we lead the field in ethical, expert behavioral health care. This is where standards rise—and healing begins, centered on your needs.

We believe every person deserves a radically better life, and we’re here to help you start yours.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 
Our Experience Makes the Difference

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 1,200 

 
Clients Have Successfully Completed Treatment
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 250 

 
Years of Behavioral Health Experience
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 

 10 

 
Private Rooms
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Outpatient Options: Treatment on Your Schedule

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

New Evening Option

Addiction Treatment Outpatient

PHP & IOP | Day & Evening Options

 
 

 PHP (Partial Hospitalization): Full-day medical & therapeutic care

 IOP (Intensive Outpatient): Flexible multi-day weekly treatment

 Day & Evening IOP Programs 

Medication-supported treatment when appropriate

Group therapy, individual sessions, relapse-prevention skills

 
 

High-level clinical support for substance use recovery—without a residential stay.

 Best For: 
Early recovery, need more support than counseling alone, step-down from inpatient or detox, and people balancing work, school, or family.

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 Call for Outpatient Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

New Program

Mental Health Treatment Outpatient

PHP & IOP | Day Option

 
 

 PHP (Partial Hospitalization): Full-day therapeutic support

 IOP (Intensive Outpatient): Consistent weekly treatment sessions

Psychiatric oversight & therapy-based care

 Daytime programs only 

 
 

Structured support for emotional health while staying rooted in daily responsibilities.

 Best For: 
Need more support than weekly therapy; depression, anxiety, trauma-related conditions; emotional regulation challenges; and step-down from inpatient mental health care.

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 Call for Mental Health Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

The Problem:

Behavioral Health issues don’t just affect your body—they cloud judgment, strain relationships, hijack your sense of purpose, and leave behind a trail of confusion and pain.

The road back can feel overwhelming, especially when you’ve tried before or felt misunderstood in the process. At SolutionPoint, we understand that this isn’t just about stopping a behavior—it’s about transforming a life.

We meet you with passion, empathy, and a commitment to help you find clarity again. You’re not alone, and you won’t be treated like a number. Here, you’ll be met with respect, honesty, and a team that shows up with compassion and transparency—because that’s the only way real healing begins.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Expanded Care:

Now Offering Comprehensive Mental Health Treatment

From anxiety and depression to trauma and bipolar disorder, SolutionPoint now offers dedicated mental health treatment designed to bring stability, relief, and understanding. If you’re struggling internally, you don’t need to face it alone. Our team is ready to support both mental health and co-occurring substance use concerns.
 Learn More 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

The Solution: Clarity, Care, and a Fresh Start

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Healing begins with clarity. At SolutionPoint, we take the time to truly understand you—medically, psychologically, and emotionally. Our 21-day clinical assessment forms the foundation of your personalized treatment plan, designed to meet your needs from detox and stabilization to long-term support.

We combine medical expertise, biopsychosocial insight, and spiritual awareness to guide your recovery—step by meaningful step. You’ll be provided with a safe, immaculate environment, good and healthy food, and a team that encourages and supports you every step of the way.

 You’ll be told the truth. You’ll be treated with dignity. You’ll begin the process of lifting your self-worth. 

This isn’t a revolving door—it’s a true solution.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 
 Solution Point Offers More:

 

 Private Rooms 

 

 
Enjoy the privacy, peace, and personal space you deserve—with a room that’s yours alone, designed for rest and recovery.

 

 Staff Client Ratio 2:1 

 

 
Experience the focused care you deserve—our staff-client ratio of 2:1 ensures you’re seen, supported, and never overlooked on your path to recovery.

 

 Pet Friendly (Dogs Welcome) 

 

 
We understand that pets are part of healing. That’s why we welcome canine companions to stay with you during treatment.

 

 Amenities 

 

 

Private chef

Outdoor mineral baths

Yoga

Soundbath healing

Gym

Hiking (take advantage of the desert atmosphere for hiking/outdoor activities)

 
 

 Outpatient Services 

 

 
We offer flexible outpatient services, including evening sessions, so you can get the support you need without disrupting your daily life.

 

 Learn More 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

Start Your Admission Process

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Call Now: 833-773-3869 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Take the first step—our team is here to help you plan your arrival with care.

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Hear From Renowned Treatment Pioneer: Mike Neatherton

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Mike Neatherton is the CEO of SolutionPoint Behavioral Health, bringing decades of leadership in addiction treatment. Known for his ethical approach and deep industry experience, Mike is committed to delivering compassionate, high-quality care that truly transforms lives. Here more from him in this video.

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Play Video 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Play Video 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Hear From Renowned Treatment Pioneer: Mike Neatherton

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Mike Neatherton is the CEO of SolutionPoint Behavioral Health, bringing decades of leadership in addiction treatment. Known for his ethical approach and deep industry experience, Mike is committed to delivering compassionate, high-quality care that truly transforms lives. Here more from him in this video.

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Our Comprehensive Rehab Program and Mental Health Treatment in Palm Springs

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Detox

 

The first step toward healing begins with safety and stability.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Addiction Assessment (Residential)

 

We don’t guess—we assess. Precision care starts with knowing you.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
PHP

 

Full-day, structured treatment designed to rebuild strength and direction.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
IOP

 

Flexibility meets accountability in our intensive outpatient care.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Aftercare

 

You’re not alone. Aftercare keeps you connected, strong, and moving forward.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Mental Health Program

 

Mental health care helps you find balance and keep it.

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

Transformed Lives. It Starts Here.

 

 
 Every Client Coins Out.

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

“
 K.S. Former Client 
 “ I came to SolutionPoint to detox and I couldn’t have come to a better place. Super comfortable.

Upon arrival, food was delicious. Staff was amazing.

My puppy enjoyed his stay, and was welcomed by staff and clients. ” 

 

“
 P.A. Former Client 
 “ Fantastic and intimate recovery facility. Would recommend to anyone needing such help. Appreciate emphasis on 12 Step plus alumni network... Staff, food, facility is great. ... ” 

 

“
 Karl Former Client 
 “ I can't say enough about the accommodations (allowing my dog to stay with me) ... I would recommend SolutionPoint to anyone that is serious and cares to end their addiction. ” 

 

“
 A.S. Former Client 
 “ The SolutionPoint staff was extremely kind and helpful. I will always appreciate what they have done for me. ” 

 

“
 David Former Client 
 “ ... The clinical staff are excellent and have helped me to understand ... I am now prepared for my life in recovery. ” 

 

“
 Eric Former Client 
 “ All of the staff are caring and great. ... I feel like it is a home, plus the food is amazing. ” 

 

“
 Alex Former Client 
 “ ... Your staff showed exceptional dedication, attention to detail, and kindness that truly made a difference. The environment was not only well-maintained and welcoming but also fostered a sense of comfort and trust throughout my time there. ... It is clear that your commitment to excellence is reflected in every aspect of your operation. Thank you once again for your exceptional service. I will always remember your kindness and professionalism. ” 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Insurance Questions?

 

 
 Solution Point accepts most PPOs. However, we are proud to be an in-network provider with:

 

 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Solution Point News and Updates

 

Resources About Addiction Treatment

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 View all

Are You Ready for the Next Step?

Whether you’re seeking treatment for yourself or a loved one, we offer private rooms for comfort, dignity, and peace of mind. Contact us today to begin your path to recovery in a setting designed for healing.

	<div  class="vc_col-sm-12 wpb_column column_container vc_column_container col child_column no-extra-padding inherit_tablet inherit_phone "   data-padding-pos="all" data-has-bg-color="false" data-bg-color="" data-bg-opacity="1" data-animation="" data-delay="0" >

</div></div><div id="fws_69af23d8cff5c" data-midnight="" data-column-margin="default" class="wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_row inner_row  right_padding_14pct"  style=""><div class="row-bg-wrap"> <div class="row-bg" ></div> </div><div class="row_col_wrap_12_inner col span_12  left">
	<div  class="vc_col-sm-12 wpb_column column_container vc_column_container col child_column has-animation no-extra-padding inherit_tablet inherit_phone "   data-padding-pos="all" data-has-bg-color="false" data-bg-color="" data-bg-opacity="1" data-animation="fade-in" data-delay="0" data-animation-easing="easeInOutQuad" >
		<div class="vc_column-inner" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="nectar-responsive-text font_size_min_16px font_size_desktop_1-1vw font_line_height_1-8 nectar-link-underline-effect"><p>Outpatient mental health treatment provides consistent therapeutic support without the intensity or time commitment of higher levels of care like PHP. Clients typically attend therapy sessions a few times a week while continuing to live at home, work, or attend school.</p>
<p>Compared to PHP, which involves multiple hours of structured treatment five days a week, outpatient care is more flexible. It’s ideal for those stepping down from a more intensive program or individuals who need ongoing support for managing mental health symptoms within the context of daily life.</p>
<p>Outpatient treatment plays a vital role in long-term mental wellness. It helps maintain the progress someone has made while continuing to build emotional resilience, self-awareness, and stability.</p>
</div><div class="nectar-cta  alignment_tablet_default alignment_phone_default display_tablet_inherit display_phone_inherit font_size_desktop_22px font_size_tablet_16px " data-color="default" data-using-bg="false" data-display="block" data-style="underline" data-alignment="left" data-text-color="custom" ><span style="color: #ff6b3d;" class="nectar-button-type"> <span class="link_wrap" style="padding-top: 4px; padding-bottom: 4px; "><a target="_blank" class="link_text" style="border-color: #ff6b3d;" role="button" href="https://solutionpointbh.com/contact-us/#starthere">Start Here</a></span></span></div>
		</div> 
	</div>
	</div> 
</div></div>
			</div> 
		</div>
	</div> 
</div></div>
		<div id="explainer"  data-column-margin="default" data-midnight="dark" data-top-percent="6%" data-bottom-percent="6%"  class="wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_row full-width-section vc_row-o-equal-height vc_row-flex vc_row-o-content-middle"  style="padding-top: calc(100vw * 0.06); padding-bottom: calc(100vw * 0.06); "><div class="row-bg-wrap" data-bg-animation="none" data-bg-animation-delay="" data-bg-overlay="false"><div class="inner-wrap row-bg-layer" ><div class="row-bg viewport-desktop using-bg-color"  style="background-color: #ffffff; "></div></div></div><div class="row_col_wrap_12 col span_12 dark left">
	<div  class="vc_col-sm-6 wpb_column column_container vc_column_container col padding-2-percent inherit_tablet inherit_phone "  data-padding-pos="right" data-has-bg-color="false" data-bg-color="" data-bg-opacity="1" data-animation="" data-delay="0" >
		<div class="vc_column-inner" >
			<div class="wpb_wrapper">
				<div class="divider-wrap" data-alignment="default"><div style="height: 60px;" class="divider"></div></div><div class="nectar-split-heading  font_size_3vw font_line_height_1-3 " data-align="default" data-m-align="inherit" data-text-effect="default" data-animation-type="line-reveal-by-space" data-animation-delay="0" data-animation-offset="" data-m-rm-animation="true" data-stagger="true" data-custom-font-size="true" style="font-size: 3vw; line-height: 3.3vw;"><h2 style=" color: #000000;">Our Outpatient Program</h2></div><div class="nectar-responsive-text font_size_min_16px font_size_desktop_17px font_line_height_1-9 nectar-link-underline-effect"><p>Our outpatient mental health program at SolutionPoint is designed to support people who are managing depression, anxiety, PTSD, bipolar disorder, and other mood or personality disorders. It’s structured, but not overwhelming—providing high-quality care in a format that fits into real life.</p>
<p>Our licensed therapists offer both individual therapy and psychiatry focused on emotional regulation, self-esteem, relationships, and daily functioning. We also coordinate closely with our psychiatric team to offer ongoing medication management and check-ins as needed.</p>
<p>Services may include:</p>
<ul>
<li>Weekly or biweekly individual therapy</li>
<li>Psychoeducation</li>
<li>Medication monitoring and psychiatric consultation</li>
<li>Personalized support with stress management and life transitions</li>
</ul>
<p>We tailor each care plan to your needs and goals—whether you’re starting therapy for the first time or continuing care after a more intensive level of treatment.</p>
</div>

<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1752863258269" >
	<div class="wpb_wrapper">
		<h2 style="text-align: center;" data-start="0" data-end="26">Mental Health Outpatient in Palm Springs: What to Expect</h2>
<p>Outpatient treatment with us is collaborative and grounded in real-world support. You’ll meet with a therapist on a regular schedule (usually once or twice a week), with access to additional services as needed.</p>
<p>Here’s what you can expect:</p>
<ul>
<li>Flexible scheduling to accommodate work, school, or caregiving responsibilities</li>
<li>Ongoing emotional and clinical support with a focus on long-term wellness</li>
<li>A safe, respectful, and stigma-free environment</li>
<li>Clear communication between you, your therapist, and our clinical team</li>
<li>Guidance in managing mental health symptoms while building a life of stability and purpose</li>
</ul>
<p>Outpatient treatment helps you stay grounded and supported as you move forward—at your own pace, with a team who sees the whole picture.</p>
	</div>
</div>

// CTM Session Tracking and Duplicate Prevention
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Function to get CTM session ID
  function getCTMSessionId() {
    try {
      if (typeof __ctm !== 'undefined' && __ctm.tracker && __ctm.tracker.getSessionId) {
        return __ctm.tracker.getSessionId();
      }
      // Fallback: try to get from localStorage or generate a unique ID
      let sessionId = localStorage.getItem('ctm_session_id');
      if (!sessionId) {
        sessionId = 'ctm_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
        localStorage.setItem('ctm_session_id', sessionId);
      }
      return sessionId;
    } catch(e) {
      console.log('CTM session tracking error:', e);
      return null;
    }
  }
  
  // Add session ID to all CF7 forms
  const cf7Forms = document.querySelectorAll('.wpcf7-form');
  cf7Forms.forEach(function(form) {
    const sessionId = getCTMSessionId();
    if (sessionId) {
      // Add hidden input for session ID
      let sessionInput = form.querySelector('input[name="ctm_session_id"]');
      if (!sessionInput) {
        sessionInput = document.createElement('input');
        sessionInput.type = 'hidden';
        sessionInput.name = 'ctm_session_id';
        form.appendChild(sessionInput);
      }
      sessionInput.value = sessionId;
      
      // Set cookie for server-side access
      document.cookie = 'ctm_session_id=' + sessionId + '; path=/; max-age=3600';
    }
  });
});
</script><script type='text/javascript'>

MENTAL HEALTH OUTPATIENT IN PALM SPRINGS

 

 Outpatient Treatment 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Sometimes the hardest part of healing is doing it while life keeps moving—but with the right support, you don’t have to choose between showing up for your world and showing up for yourself.

 

 Now Accepting New Clients! 
 
 

 

 
 

 Call for Mental Health Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

The Role of Outpatient Treatment

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Outpatient mental health treatment provides consistent therapeutic support without the intensity or time commitment of higher levels of care like PHP. Clients typically attend therapy sessions a few times a week while continuing to live at home, work, or attend school.

Compared to PHP, which involves multiple hours of structured treatment five days a week, outpatient care is more flexible. It’s ideal for those stepping down from a more intensive program or individuals who need ongoing support for managing mental health symptoms within the context of daily life.

Outpatient treatment plays a vital role in long-term mental wellness. It helps maintain the progress someone has made while continuing to build emotional resilience, self-awareness, and stability.

 Start Here 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

Our Outpatient Program

Our outpatient mental health program at SolutionPoint is designed to support people who are managing depression, anxiety, PTSD, bipolar disorder, and other mood or personality disorders. It’s structured, but not overwhelming—providing high-quality care in a format that fits into real life.

Our licensed therapists offer both individual therapy and psychiatry focused on emotional regulation, self-esteem, relationships, and daily functioning. We also coordinate closely with our psychiatric team to offer ongoing medication management and check-ins as needed.

Services may include:

 

Weekly or biweekly individual therapy

Psychoeducation

Medication monitoring and psychiatric consultation

Personalized support with stress management and life transitions

 

We tailor each care plan to your needs and goals—whether you’re starting therapy for the first time or continuing care after a more intensive level of treatment.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Mental Health Outpatient in Palm Springs: What to Expect

Outpatient treatment with us is collaborative and grounded in real-world support. You’ll meet with a therapist on a regular schedule (usually once or twice a week), with access to additional services as needed.

Here’s what you can expect:

 

Flexible scheduling to accommodate work, school, or caregiving responsibilities

Ongoing emotional and clinical support with a focus on long-term wellness

A safe, respectful, and stigma-free environment

Clear communication between you, your therapist, and our clinical team

Guidance in managing mental health symptoms while building a life of stability and purpose

 

Outpatient treatment helps you stay grounded and supported as you move forward—at your own pace, with a team who sees the whole picture.

 

 Call Now: 833-773-3869 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Are You Ready for the Next Step?

Whether you’re seeking treatment for yourself or a loved one, we offer private rooms for comfort, dignity, and peace of mind. Contact us today to begin your path to recovery in a setting designed for healing.

<div class="nectar-responsive-text nectar-link-underline-effect"><p>At SolutionPoint, we don’t expect perfection. We don’t expect you to have it all figured out. We’re here for people who are tired of the loop—sick of needing pills to get through the day or heroin to feel anything at all.<br />

	<div  class="vc_col-sm-12 wpb_column column_container vc_column_container col child_column has-animation no-extra-padding inherit_tablet inherit_phone "   data-padding-pos="all" data-has-bg-color="false" data-bg-color="" data-bg-opacity="1" data-animation="fade-in-from-bottom" data-delay="0" >

<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1751311633101" >
	<div class="wpb_wrapper">
		<h2>Why Solution Point Works</h2>
	</div>
</div>



<div class="nectar-responsive-text nectar-link-underline-effect"><p>Opioid addiction is deep, complex, and often feels impossible to untangle alone. At SolutionPoint, we don’t offer one-size-fits-all rehab. We offer transformation, one grounded in clinical expertise and the core principles of <em>The Solution</em>.</p>
<p><strong>[icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]We Help You Heal Your Body, Clear Your Mind, and Change Your Life</strong></p>
<p>From detox to long-term planning, we provide a full roadmap to healing: stabilization, assessment, therapeutic care, and ongoing support. You’ll receive good food, be treated with dignity, and begin to lift your self-worth—because you’re not just recovering, you’re rebuilding.<strong><br />
</strong><strong><br />
</strong></p>
<p><strong>[icon color=”extra-color-2″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]</strong><strong>We’re Built to Break the Cycle</strong></p>
<p>We were founded to interrupt the relapse–recovery–relapse loop that so often traps people. With a 21-day clinical assessment and individualized care plan, you’ll get more than symptom relief—you’ll get clarity, strategy, and hope.</p>
<p><strong> </strong></p>
<p><strong>[icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]</strong><strong>Every Client Coins Out</strong></p>
<p>We don’t just hope you make it. We plan for it. Our mission is for every person to finish treatment stronger, clearer, and better equipped for life beyond addiction. You’ll be supported every step of the way—by a team that shows up with transparency, respect, and heart.</p>
<p><strong>[icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]</strong><strong>You’ll Feel the Difference</strong></p>
<ul>
<li>A safe and immaculate environment</li>
<li>Clinicians who lead with experience, ethics, and empathy</li>
<li>Activities that are meaningful and even fun</li>
<li>An environment built on truth and collaboration</li>
<li>A plan that changes your life—not just your behavior</li>
</ul>
<p> </p>
<p> </p>
<p>You don’t have to keep doing this alone. Let us help you find <em>The Solution.</em></p>
</div>
		</div> 
	</div>
	</div> 
</div></div>
			</div> 
		</div>
	</div> 
</div></div>

                position: absolute;
                top: 50%;
                left: 50%;
                content: "";
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                margin: -50% auto auto -50%;
                -webkit-transform-origin: 50% 50%;
                transform-origin: 50% 50%;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background-color: currentColor;
                opacity: 1;
                z-index: 11;
                pointer-events: none;
                animation: nectar_pulsate 2s cubic-bezier(.2,1,.2,1) infinite;

// CTM Session Tracking and Duplicate Prevention
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Function to get CTM session ID
  function getCTMSessionId() {
    try {
      if (typeof __ctm !== 'undefined' && __ctm.tracker && __ctm.tracker.getSessionId) {
        return __ctm.tracker.getSessionId();
      }
      // Fallback: try to get from localStorage or generate a unique ID
      let sessionId = localStorage.getItem('ctm_session_id');
      if (!sessionId) {
        sessionId = 'ctm_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
        localStorage.setItem('ctm_session_id', sessionId);
      }
      return sessionId;
    } catch(e) {
      console.log('CTM session tracking error:', e);
      return null;
    }
  }
  
  // Add session ID to all CF7 forms
  const cf7Forms = document.querySelectorAll('.wpcf7-form');
  cf7Forms.forEach(function(form) {
    const sessionId = getCTMSessionId();
    if (sessionId) {
      // Add hidden input for session ID
      let sessionInput = form.querySelector('input[name="ctm_session_id"]');
      if (!sessionInput) {
        sessionInput = document.createElement('input');
        sessionInput.type = 'hidden';
        sessionInput.name = 'ctm_session_id';
        form.appendChild(sessionInput);
      }
      sessionInput.value = sessionId;
      
      // Set cookie for server-side access
      document.cookie = 'ctm_session_id=' + sessionId + '; path=/; max-age=3600';
    }
  });
});

Opioid Rehab in Palm Springs - SolutionPoint Addiction Treatment

 833-773-3869 

 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 
 

 
 
 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 Press enter to begin your search 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Close Search 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

OPIOID REHAB IN PALM SPRINGS

 
 
 

 
 

 

 Opioid Addiction
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Whether it's prescription painkillers or heroin, opioid addiction is a complex, often devastating cycle. But no matter how long you’ve been in it, there is a way out. At SolutionPoint, we meet you with experience, clarity, and deep compassion—because freedom is possible.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get Started 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Understanding What You're Up Against

Opioid addiction changes your brain chemistry, your nervous system, your tolerance for pain—both physical and emotional. It often starts with real injury, real prescriptions, and then takes over in ways that feel impossible to stop. The withdrawal can feel brutal. The cravings—relentless. And the shame, heavy.

At our center for opioid addiction rehab in Palm Springs , we treat more than withdrawal. We treat the person inside the pain. With medical care, structured support, and real understanding, we help you stabilize your body and begin to restore your mind and spirit.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
What Our Prescription Pill Rehab Addresses:

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 Medical Detox & Withdrawal Management 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Our team is trained in safe, medically supervised detox protocols including the use of MAT (Medication-Assisted Treatment) to manage symptoms and protect your nervous system during this critical stage. 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 Care for Physical and Emotional Pain 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Opioid use often starts with pain, physical or emotional. We take time to understand what you’re carrying and help you develop new tools to live with clarity, comfort, and resilience. 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
 Restoring Emotional Stability and Function 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Opioid use often flattens emotional range and motivation. We help clients reawaken emotional connection, purpose, and healthy daily rhythm. 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
A New Place to Begin

 

At SolutionPoint, we don’t expect perfection. We don’t expect you to have it all figured out. We’re here for people who are tired of the loop—sick of needing pills to get through the day or heroin to feel anything at all.

This is not just detox. This is not just maintenance.

This is The Solution: a place to stabilize, gain clarity, and begin again—with care that is intelligent, compassionate, and built entirely around you.

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

Start Your Admission Process

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Call Now: 833-773-3869 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Take the first step—our team is here to help you plan your arrival with care.

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Why Solution Point Works

 

Opioid addiction is deep, complex, and often feels impossible to untangle alone. At SolutionPoint, we don’t offer one-size-fits-all rehab. We offer transformation, one grounded in clinical expertise and the core principles of The Solution .

 [icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]We Help You Heal Your Body, Clear Your Mind, and Change Your Life 

From detox to long-term planning, we provide a full roadmap to healing: stabilization, assessment, therapeutic care, and ongoing support. You’ll receive good food, be treated with dignity, and begin to lift your self-worth—because you’re not just recovering, you’re rebuilding. 

 

 

 [icon color=”extra-color-2″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”] We’re Built to Break the Cycle 

We were founded to interrupt the relapse–recovery–relapse loop that so often traps people. With a 21-day clinical assessment and individualized care plan, you’ll get more than symptom relief—you’ll get clarity, strategy, and hope.

   

 [icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”] Every Client Coins Out 

We don’t just hope you make it. We plan for it. Our mission is for every person to finish treatment stronger, clearer, and better equipped for life beyond addiction. You’ll be supported every step of the way—by a team that shows up with transparency, respect, and heart.

 [icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”] You’ll Feel the Difference 

 

A safe and immaculate environment

Clinicians who lead with experience, ethics, and empathy

Activities that are meaningful and even fun

An environment built on truth and collaboration

A plan that changes your life—not just your behavior

 

 

 

You don’t have to keep doing this alone. Let us help you find The Solution. 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Our Comprehensive Rehab Program in Palm Springs

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Detox

 

The first step toward healing begins with safety and stability.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Addiction Assessment (Residential)

 

We don’t guess—we assess. Precision care starts with knowing you.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
PHP

 

Full-day, structured treatment designed to rebuild strength and direction.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
IOP

 

Flexibility meets accountability in our intensive outpatient care.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Aftercare

 

You’re not alone. Aftercare keeps you connected, strong, and moving forward.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Are You Ready for the Next Step?

Whether you’re seeking treatment for yourself or a loved one, we offer private rooms for comfort, dignity, and peace of mind. Contact us today to begin your path to recovery in a setting designed for healing.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 Call for Outpatient Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 Call for Residential Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 Call for Mental Health Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

HEAL YOUR BODY

 CLEAR YOUR MIND 

CHANGE YOUR LIFE

		<div class="vc_column-inner" >
			<div class="wpb_wrapper">
				<h2 style="font-size: 45px;text-align: center" class="vc_custom_heading vc_do_custom_heading" >Understanding What You're Up Against</h2><div class="divider-wrap" data-alignment="default"><div style="margin-top: 22.5px; width: 20%; height: 2px; margin-bottom: 22.5px;" data-width="20%" data-animate="yes" data-animation-delay="" data-color="accent-color" class="divider-small-border"></div></div><div class="nectar-responsive-text font_size_desktop_19px font_line_height_1-6 nectar-link-underline-effect" data-inherit-heading-family="p"><p>Addiction and mental health challenges often feed into each other. Depression can lead to self-medicating. Anxiety can spiral into compulsive behavior. Trauma can keep the nervous system locked in survival mode. And once addiction takes hold, it makes the original issue even harder to treat.</p>
<p>That’s why progress can feel like two steps forward, one step back. If you’ve tried treatment before and it didn’t stick, it may be because the other diagnosis—the depression, the PTSD, the mood disorder—was never addressed alongside the addiction.</p>
<p>You don’t have to choose which part to heal. We treat both, together.</p>

<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1751311633101" >
	<div class="wpb_wrapper">
		<h2>Why Solution Point Works</h2>
	</div>
</div>



<div class="nectar-responsive-text nectar-link-underline-effect"><p><strong>[icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]We don’t make you pick a lane.<br />
</strong>Your story includes both addiction and mental health—so does your treatment. We offer true dual diagnosis care with depth and coordination.<strong><br />
</strong></p>
<p><strong>[icon color=”extra-color-2″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]</strong><strong>We’re structured without being rigid.</strong><br />
Our framework is strong enough to hold your recovery, yet flexible enough to meet you where you are.</p>
<p><strong>[icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]</strong><strong>We bring the whole team.</strong><br />
Our transdisciplinary model means therapists, medical staff, and support professionals work together, not in silos. You benefit from every perspective.</p>
<p><strong>[icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]</strong><strong>We focus on healing that lasts.</strong><br />
Using the model in <em>The Solution</em>, we don’t just treat crises—we help you build insight, emotional skill, and self-respect that carry into real life.</p>
</div>
		</div> 
	</div>
	</div> 
</div></div>

		</div>
	</div> 
</div></div>

	</div>

            .nectar-pulsate i:after {
                display: block;

                top: 50%;
                left: 50%;
                content: "";
                width: 100%;
                height: 100%;
                margin: -50% auto auto -50%;
                -webkit-transform-origin: 50% 50%;
                transform-origin: 50% 50%;
                border-radius: 50%;
                background-color: currentColor;
                opacity: 1;
                z-index: 11;
                pointer-events: none;
                animation: nectar_pulsate 2s cubic-bezier(.2,1,.2,1) infinite;
            }

// CTM Session Tracking and Duplicate Prevention
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Function to get CTM session ID
  function getCTMSessionId() {
    try {
      if (typeof __ctm !== 'undefined' && __ctm.tracker && __ctm.tracker.getSessionId) {
        return __ctm.tracker.getSessionId();
      }
      // Fallback: try to get from localStorage or generate a unique ID
      let sessionId = localStorage.getItem('ctm_session_id');
      if (!sessionId) {
        sessionId = 'ctm_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
        localStorage.setItem('ctm_session_id', sessionId);
      }
      return sessionId;
    } catch(e) {
      console.log('CTM session tracking error:', e);
      return null;
    }
  }
  
  // Add session ID to all CF7 forms
  const cf7Forms = document.querySelectorAll('.wpcf7-form');
  cf7Forms.forEach(function(form) {
    const sessionId = getCTMSessionId();
    if (sessionId) {
      // Add hidden input for session ID
      let sessionInput = form.querySelector('input[name="ctm_session_id"]');
      if (!sessionInput) {
        sessionInput = document.createElement('input');
        sessionInput.type = 'hidden';
        sessionInput.name = 'ctm_session_id';
        form.appendChild(sessionInput);
      }
      sessionInput.value = sessionId;
      
      // Set cookie for server-side access
      document.cookie = 'ctm_session_id=' + sessionId + '; path=/; max-age=3600';
    }
  });
});

 Press enter to begin your search 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Close Search 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

DUAL DIAGNOSIS TREATMENT IN PALM SPRINGS

 
 
 

 
 

 

 Dual Diagnosis
 
 

 
 
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Sometimes addiction isn’t the whole story. Beneath the substance use, there may be untreated depression, anxiety, trauma, or another mental health condition making sobriety feel impossible to maintain. When both are present, both must be treated. At SolutionPoint, our Dual Diagnosis program is designed to help you heal on multiple levels—not just the symptoms that show, but the deeper patterns that drive them.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 Get Started 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
Understanding What You're Up Against

Addiction and mental health challenges often feed into each other. Depression can lead to self-medicating. Anxiety can spiral into compulsive behavior. Trauma can keep the nervous system locked in survival mode. And once addiction takes hold, it makes the original issue even harder to treat.

That’s why progress can feel like two steps forward, one step back. If you’ve tried treatment before and it didn’t stick, it may be because the other diagnosis—the depression, the PTSD, the mood disorder—was never addressed alongside the addiction.

You don’t have to choose which part to heal. We treat both, together.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Dual Diagnosis Treatment Addresses:

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Mental Health + Substance Abuse

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 We treat addiction and underlying mental health conditions simultaneously, with licensed clinicians and medical support on both sides. 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Root Causes

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 Our integrated approach gets below the surface to address trauma, disconnection, or emotional pain that may drive substance use. 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 
 

 

 

 
Stabilization and Resilience

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 We focus on helping you find real stability, not just symptom relief—so you’re supported now and better equipped for what’s ahead. 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
A New Place to Begin

 

At SolutionPoint, we know dual diagnosis recovery isn’t a straight line. That’s why we offer calm, structured care that responds to who you are—not just what you’re struggling with.

You don’t have to “get stable first” to be taken seriously. We’re here to help with both the mental health challenges and the substance use concerns from the start—with kindness, clarity, and zero shame.

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

Start Your Admission Process

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 Call Now: 833-773-3869 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Take the first step—our team is here to help you plan your arrival with care.

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Why Solution Point Works

 

 [icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”]We don’t make you pick a lane.

 Your story includes both addiction and mental health—so does your treatment. We offer true dual diagnosis care with depth and coordination. 

 

 [icon color=”extra-color-2″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”] We’re structured without being rigid. 

Our framework is strong enough to hold your recovery, yet flexible enough to meet you where you are.

 [icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”] We bring the whole team. 

Our transdisciplinary model means therapists, medical staff, and support professionals work together, not in silos. You benefit from every perspective.

 [icon color=”extra-color-1″ size=”tiny” icon_size=”” image=”fa-adjust”] We focus on healing that lasts. 

Using the model in The Solution , we don’t just treat crises—we help you build insight, emotional skill, and self-respect that carry into real life.

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Are You Ready for the Next Step?

Whether you’re seeking treatment for yourself or a loved one, we offer private rooms for comfort, dignity, and peace of mind. Contact us today to begin your path to recovery in a setting designed for healing.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 Call for Outpatient Addiction Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 Call for Residential Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 Call for Mental Health Treatment

</div></div><div id="fws_69af2760d7605" data-midnight="" data-column-margin="default" class="wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_row inner_row  right_padding_14pct"  style=""><div class="row-bg-wrap"> <div class="row-bg" ></div> </div><div class="row_col_wrap_12_inner col span_12  left">
	<div  class="vc_col-sm-12 wpb_column column_container vc_column_container col child_column has-animation no-extra-padding inherit_tablet inherit_phone "   data-padding-pos="all" data-has-bg-color="false" data-bg-color="" data-bg-opacity="1" data-animation="fade-in" data-delay="0" data-animation-easing="easeInOutQuad" >
		<div class="vc_column-inner" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="nectar-responsive-text font_size_min_16px font_size_desktop_1-1vw font_line_height_1-8 nectar-link-underline-effect"><p>A diagnosis can be both a relief and a limitation. It can give language to your struggles—but it can’t explain everything. That’s why at SolutionPoint, we don’t treat diagnoses in isolation. We treat people. Fully. Thoughtfully. Respectfully.</p>
<p>Mental health conditions often overlap or hide beneath patterns of avoidance, emotional dysregulation, or substance use. Sometimes what looks like addiction is actually chronic untreated anxiety. Sometimes what’s been labeled as a personality disorder is a response to early emotional neglect.</p>
<p>We’re here to ask the right questions, provide expert assessments, and create space for deeper insight. You don’t need to show up already knowing what’s wrong—you just need to show up.</p>
</div><div class="nectar-cta  alignment_tablet_default alignment_phone_default display_tablet_inherit display_phone_inherit font_size_desktop_22px font_size_tablet_16px " data-color="default" data-using-bg="false" data-display="block" data-style="underline" data-alignment="left" data-text-color="custom" ><span style="color: #ff6b3d;" class="nectar-button-type"> <span class="link_wrap" style="padding-top: 4px; padding-bottom: 4px; "><a target="_blank" class="link_text" style="border-color: #ff6b3d;" role="button" href="#">Start Here</a></span></span></div>
		</div> 
	</div>
	</div> 
</div></div>

</div></div>
		<div id="explainer"  data-column-margin="default" data-midnight="dark" data-top-percent="6%" data-bottom-percent="6%"  class="wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_row full-width-section vc_row-o-equal-height vc_row-flex vc_row-o-content-middle"  style="padding-top: calc(100vw * 0.06); padding-bottom: calc(100vw * 0.06); "><div class="row-bg-wrap" data-bg-animation="none" data-bg-animation-delay="" data-bg-overlay="false"><div class="inner-wrap row-bg-layer" ><div class="row-bg viewport-desktop using-bg-color"  style="background-color: #ffffff; "></div></div></div><div class="row_col_wrap_12 col span_12 dark left">

				<div class="divider-wrap" data-alignment="default"><div style="height: 60px;" class="divider"></div></div><div class="nectar-split-heading  font_size_3vw font_line_height_1-3 " data-align="default" data-m-align="inherit" data-text-effect="default" data-animation-type="line-reveal-by-space" data-animation-delay="0" data-animation-offset="" data-m-rm-animation="true" data-stagger="true" data-custom-font-size="true" style="font-size: 3vw; line-height: 3.3vw;"><h2 style=" color: #000000;">What We Treat</h2></div><div class="nectar-responsive-text font_size_min_16px font_size_desktop_17px font_line_height_1-9 nectar-link-underline-effect"><p>Our focus is on mood and personality disorders, which allows us to offer highly individualized, targeted treatment. We work with adults who are ready to move forward—with clarity, intention, and real clinical support.</p>
<p>Our program is designed for adults experiencing:</p>
<ul>
<li>Depression</li>
<li>Anxiety</li>
<li>Bipolar Disorder</li>
<li>Borderline Personality Disorder (BPD)</li>
<li>PTSD and trauma</li>
<li>Dual diagnosis (mental health + substance use)</li>
</ul>
<p>We specialize in working with individuals who are high-functioning yet emotionally overwhelmed, stuck in patterns they can’t name, or exhausted from trying to manage it all alone.</p>
</div>

</div></div><div id="fws_69af2760dad31" data-midnight="" data-column-margin="default" class="wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_row inner_row"  style=""><div class="row-bg-wrap"> <div class="row-bg" ></div> </div><div class="row_col_wrap_12_inner col span_12  left">
	<div  class="vc_col-sm-12 wpb_column column_container vc_column_container col child_column no-extra-padding inherit_tablet inherit_phone "   data-padding-pos="all" data-has-bg-color="false" data-bg-color="" data-bg-opacity="1" data-animation="" data-delay="0" >

<div class="wpb_text_column wpb_content_element  vc_custom_1752502928473" style=" max-width: 700px; display: inline-block;">
	<div class="wpb_wrapper">
		<p>We don’t believe in surface-level treatment. The way we work reflects <em>The Solution</em>—our guiding philosophy that integrates <strong>biological, psychological, relational, and spiritual components of care</strong>.</p>
<h4>Each client receives:</h4>
<ul>
<li>Comprehensive psychiatric and psychological assessment</li>
<li>Individual and group therapy with licensed clinicians</li>
<li>Relational work that supports communication and identity clarity</li>
<li>Holistic practices that support nervous system regulation (mindfulness, somatic work, movement, and breath)</li>
<li>Collaboration with medical providers, when medication management is appropriate</li>
</ul>
<h4>At SolutionPoint, your plan is simple:</h4>
<p><strong>Heal your body<br />
</strong><strong>Clear your mind<br />
</strong><strong>Change your life</strong></p>
<p>You’re worth it. Let’s get started.</p>
	</div>
</div>

// CTM Session Tracking and Duplicate Prevention
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Function to get CTM session ID
  function getCTMSessionId() {
    try {
      if (typeof __ctm !== 'undefined' && __ctm.tracker && __ctm.tracker.getSessionId) {
        return __ctm.tracker.getSessionId();
      }
      // Fallback: try to get from localStorage or generate a unique ID
      let sessionId = localStorage.getItem('ctm_session_id');
      if (!sessionId) {
        sessionId = 'ctm_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
        localStorage.setItem('ctm_session_id', sessionId);
      }
      return sessionId;
    } catch(e) {
      console.log('CTM session tracking error:', e);
      return null;
    }
  }
  
  // Add session ID to all CF7 forms
  const cf7Forms = document.querySelectorAll('.wpcf7-form');
  cf7Forms.forEach(function(form) {
    const sessionId = getCTMSessionId();
    if (sessionId) {
      // Add hidden input for session ID
      let sessionInput = form.querySelector('input[name="ctm_session_id"]');
      if (!sessionInput) {
        sessionInput = document.createElement('input');
        sessionInput.type = 'hidden';
        sessionInput.name = 'ctm_session_id';
        form.appendChild(sessionInput);
      }
      sessionInput.value = sessionId;
      
      // Set cookie for server-side access
      document.cookie = 'ctm_session_id=' + sessionId + '; path=/; max-age=3600';
    }
  });
});
</script><script type='text/javascript'>

MENTAL HEALTH TREATMENT IN PALM SPRINGS

 

 Our Mental Health Program  
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Mental health treatment should be more than symptom management. At SolutionPoint, we look deeper—beyond the diagnosis—into the patterns, pain, and pressures that shape a person’s life. From depression and anxiety to mood and personality disorders, our work begins not just with what's going wrong, but with what needs care, structure, and attention to heal.

 

 Now Accepting New Clients! 
 
 

 

 
 

 Call for Mental Health Treatment 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

A Different Approach to Mental Health Treatment

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

A diagnosis can be both a relief and a limitation. It can give language to your struggles—but it can’t explain everything. That’s why at SolutionPoint, we don’t treat diagnoses in isolation. We treat people. Fully. Thoughtfully. Respectfully.

Mental health conditions often overlap or hide beneath patterns of avoidance, emotional dysregulation, or substance use. Sometimes what looks like addiction is actually chronic untreated anxiety. Sometimes what’s been labeled as a personality disorder is a response to early emotional neglect.

We’re here to ask the right questions, provide expert assessments, and create space for deeper insight. You don’t need to show up already knowing what’s wrong—you just need to show up.

 Start Here 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

What We Treat

Our focus is on mood and personality disorders, which allows us to offer highly individualized, targeted treatment. We work with adults who are ready to move forward—with clarity, intention, and real clinical support.

Our program is designed for adults experiencing:

 

Depression

Anxiety

Bipolar Disorder

Borderline Personality Disorder (BPD)

PTSD and trauma

Dual diagnosis (mental health + substance use)

 

We specialize in working with individuals who are high-functioning yet emotionally overwhelmed, stuck in patterns they can’t name, or exhausted from trying to manage it all alone.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Our Integrated Model of Care

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
We don’t believe in surface-level treatment. The way we work reflects The Solution —our guiding philosophy that integrates biological, psychological, relational, and spiritual components of care .

Each client receives:

 

Comprehensive psychiatric and psychological assessment

Individual and group therapy with licensed clinicians

Relational work that supports communication and identity clarity

Holistic practices that support nervous system regulation (mindfulness, somatic work, movement, and breath)

Collaboration with medical providers, when medication management is appropriate

 

At SolutionPoint, your plan is simple:

 Heal your body

 Clear your mind

 Change your life 

You’re worth it. Let’s get started.

 

 
 
 

 
 

 Call Now: 833-773-3869 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Are You Ready for the Next Step?

Whether you’re seeking treatment for yourself or a loved one, we offer private rooms for comfort, dignity, and peace of mind. Contact us today to begin your path to recovery in a setting designed for healing.

    makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=cartData", { body })
      .then((response) => {
        var data = JSON.parse(response);
        setCartData(data, adapter);
      })
  }

  function setCartData(cartData, adapter) {
    Object.keys(cartData.avs).forEach((key, value) => {
      adapter.attr(`wp_${key}`, cartData.avs[key]);
    })
  }

  function setAssocData(assocData, adapter) {
    Object.keys(assocData).forEach((key) => {
      adapter.attr(`wp_${key}`, assocData[key]);
    })
  }

  var RuleHandler = {
    hasVisitorCartRules: (campaignMeta) => {
      return !!(campaignMeta.rules.visitorCart || campaignMeta.rules.visitorCartRevamp || campaignMeta.rules.visitorCartV3);
    },
    hasVisitorAttributeRule: (campaignMeta) => {
      return !!campaignMeta.rules.visitorAttribute;
    }
  }

  document.querySelector('html').addEventListener('optimonk#embedded-campaigns-init', function(e) {
    var campaignsData = e.parameters;

    if (!campaignsData.length) {
      return;
    }

    var adapter = window.OptiMonkEmbedded.Visitor.createAdapter();
    var hasCartRule = false;
    var hasAttributeRule = false;

    campaignsData.forEach((campaignMetaData) => {
      hasCartRule = hasCartRule || RuleHandler.hasVisitorCartRules(campaignMetaData);
      hasAttributeRule = hasAttributeRule || RuleHandler.hasVisitorAttributeRule(campaignMetaData);
    });

    setAssocData(pvData, adapter);

    if (hasCartRule) {
      observeAjaxCartActions(adapter);
      fetchCart(adapter);
    }

    if (hasAttributeRule) {
      makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=productData", { body })

          var data = JSON.parse(response);
          setAssocData(data, adapter);
        })
    }
  });

  document.querySelector('html').addEventListener('optimonk#campaigns_initialized', function () {
    if (!OptiMonk.campaigns) {
      return;
    }

    var adapter = window.OptiMonk.Visitor.createAdapter();

    setAssocData(pvData, adapter);

    if (OptiMonk.campaigns.filter(campaign => campaign.hasVisitorAttributeRules()).length) {
      makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=productData", { body })
        .then((response) => {
          var data = JSON.parse(response);
          setAssocData(data, adapter);
        });
    }
  });

            element.fireEvent(`on${event.eventType}`, event);

            element[eventName]();

            element[`on${eventName}`]();
        }
    };
    
    var adapter = OptiMonkEmbedded.Visitor.createAdapter();

    var orderData = null;
    

    if (orderData) {

    }

    console.log('[OM-plugin] visitor attributes updated');

    triggerEvent(document.querySelector('html'), 'optimonk#wc-attributes-updated');

});

		</div> 
	</div>

</div></div><div id="fws_69af23db102ec" data-midnight="" data-column-margin="default" class="wpb_row vc_row-fluid vc_row inner_row  right_padding_14pct"  style=""><div class="row-bg-wrap"> <div class="row-bg" ></div> </div><div class="row_col_wrap_12_inner col span_12  left">
	<div  class="vc_col-sm-12 wpb_column column_container vc_column_container col child_column has-animation no-extra-padding inherit_tablet inherit_phone "   data-padding-pos="all" data-has-bg-color="false" data-bg-color="" data-bg-opacity="1" data-animation="fade-in" data-delay="0" data-animation-easing="easeInOutQuad" >
		<div class="vc_column-inner" >
		<div class="wpb_wrapper">
			<div class="nectar-responsive-text font_size_min_16px font_size_desktop_1-1vw font_line_height_1-8 nectar-link-underline-effect"><p>Detox is more than just a starting point—it’s a critical biological process. When someone has been using drugs or alcohol regularly, their body adapts to rely on that substance for daily functioning. The longer the use, the deeper that dependency runs.</p>
<p>Detox is the process of removing these substances and allowing the body to rebalance its natural chemistry. But this doesn’t happen without consequences—especially with substances like alcohol or benzodiazepines, which can trigger seizures or life-threatening complications when stopped abruptly. That’s why medically supervised detox is essential. It ensures withdrawal symptoms are managed with safety, dignity, and comfort.</p>
</div><div class="nectar-cta  alignment_tablet_default alignment_phone_default display_tablet_inherit display_phone_inherit font_size_desktop_22px font_size_tablet_16px " data-color="default" data-using-bg="false" data-display="block" data-style="underline" data-alignment="left" data-text-color="custom" ><span style="color: #ff6b3d;" class="nectar-button-type"> <span class="link_wrap" style="padding-top: 4px; padding-bottom: 4px; "><a target="_blank" class="link_text" style="border-color: #ff6b3d;" role="button" href="https://solutionpointbh.com/contact-us/#starthere">Start Here</a></span></span></div>

Once you arrive, our clinical team—composed of a medical director, nurse practitioner, licensed nurses, and trained technicians—will begin managing your care immediately.</p>
<p>You’ll have your own private room. You’ll be monitored 24/7. You’ll be heard.</p>
<p>At our detox in Palm Springs, we prescribe comfort medications when clinically appropriate, alongside hydration, nutrition, and body movement to make the experience as stable and manageable as possible. From the very beginning, our goal is to stabilize your body, support your mind, and ensure you’re never alone.</p>

		<h2 style="text-align: center;" data-start="0" data-end="26">Beyond Detox in Palm Springs: What Comes Next?</h2>
<p>Detox is only the beginning. As your body begins to stabilize, you’ll meet the extended SolutionPoint care team—including licensed therapists, counselors, case managers, and psychiatrists. Together, they’ll help you map a personalized treatment plan grounded in your needs and long-term recovery.</p>
<p>We also incorporate alternative therapies to help the body and mind reconnect:</p>
<ul>
<li>Meditation</li>
<li>Yoga and movement</li>
<li>Mindfulness exercises</li>
<li>Mineral baths (with medical approval)</li>
</ul>
<p>At SolutionPoint, your plan is simple:</p>
<p><strong>Heal your body<br />
</strong><strong>Clear your mind<br />
</strong><strong>Change your life</strong></p>
<p>You’re worth it. Let’s get started.</p>

</div>

// CTM Session Tracking and Duplicate Prevention
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  // Function to get CTM session ID
  function getCTMSessionId() {
    try {
      if (typeof __ctm !== 'undefined' && __ctm.tracker && __ctm.tracker.getSessionId) {
        return __ctm.tracker.getSessionId();
      }
      // Fallback: try to get from localStorage or generate a unique ID
      let sessionId = localStorage.getItem('ctm_session_id');
      if (!sessionId) {
        sessionId = 'ctm_' + Date.now() + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).substr(2, 9);
        localStorage.setItem('ctm_session_id', sessionId);
      }
      return sessionId;
    } catch(e) {
      console.log('CTM session tracking error:', e);
      return null;
    }
  }
  
  // Add session ID to all CF7 forms
  const cf7Forms = document.querySelectorAll('.wpcf7-form');
  cf7Forms.forEach(function(form) {
    const sessionId = getCTMSessionId();
    if (sessionId) {
      // Add hidden input for session ID
      let sessionInput = form.querySelector('input[name="ctm_session_id"]');
      if (!sessionInput) {
        sessionInput = document.createElement('input');
        sessionInput.type = 'hidden';
        sessionInput.name = 'ctm_session_id';
        form.appendChild(sessionInput);
      }
      sessionInput.value = sessionId;
      
      // Set cookie for server-side access
      document.cookie = 'ctm_session_id=' + sessionId + '; path=/; max-age=3600';
    }
  });
});
</script><script type='text/javascript'>

 Press enter to begin your search 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 Close Search 
 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 DETOX IN PALM SPRINGS 

 

 Detox Treatment Center For Alcohol & Drugs  
 
 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Detox is the first step of a new life in recovery. After the frustration and fear of living with a substance use disorder, it provides an opportunity for change.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 Play Video 
 
Find Out More About Detox
 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Why Detox Matters: The Medical and Biological Truth

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Detox is more than just a starting point—it’s a critical biological process. When someone has been using drugs or alcohol regularly, their body adapts to rely on that substance for daily functioning. The longer the use, the deeper that dependency runs.

Detox is the process of removing these substances and allowing the body to rebalance its natural chemistry. But this doesn’t happen without consequences—especially with substances like alcohol or benzodiazepines, which can trigger seizures or life-threatening complications when stopped abruptly. That’s why medically supervised detox is essential. It ensures withdrawal symptoms are managed with safety, dignity, and comfort.

 Start Here 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

What to Expect at SolutionPoint: Safe, Supervised, and Private

When you contact SolutionPoint, you’re immediately connected with a compassionate, knowledgeable staff member who will walk you through the process. Once you arrive, our clinical team—composed of a medical director, nurse practitioner, licensed nurses, and trained technicians—will begin managing your care immediately.

You’ll have your own private room. You’ll be monitored 24/7. You’ll be heard.

At our detox in Palm Springs, we prescribe comfort medications when clinically appropriate, alongside hydration, nutrition, and body movement to make the experience as stable and manageable as possible. From the very beginning, our goal is to stabilize your body, support your mind, and ensure you’re never alone.

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
Beyond Detox in Palm Springs: What Comes Next?

Detox is only the beginning. As your body begins to stabilize, you’ll meet the extended SolutionPoint care team—including licensed therapists, counselors, case managers, and psychiatrists. Together, they’ll help you map a personalized treatment plan grounded in your needs and long-term recovery.

We also incorporate alternative therapies to help the body and mind reconnect:

 

Meditation

Yoga and movement

Mindfulness exercises

Mineral baths (with medical approval)

 

At SolutionPoint, your plan is simple:

 Heal your body

 Clear your mind

 Change your life 

You’re worth it. Let’s get started.

 

 Call Now: 833-773-3869 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 

 
 

 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 
 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 
 
 
 

 
 

 

 

 

 
Are You Ready for the Next Step?

Whether you’re seeking treatment for yourself or a loved one, we offer private rooms for comfort, dignity, and peace of mind. Contact us today to begin your path to recovery in a setting designed for healing.

  function makePostRequest(e,t){var n=[];if(t.body){for(var o in t.body)n.push(encodeURIComponent(o)+"="+encodeURIComponent(t.body[o]));t.body=n.join("&")}return window.fetch?new Promise(n=>{var o={method:"POST",headers:{"Content-Type":"application/x-www-form-urlencoded"},redirect:"follow",body:{},...t};window.fetch(e,o).then(e=>{n(e.text())})}):new Promise(t=>{var o;"undefined"==typeof XMLHttpRequest&&t(null),(o=new XMLHttpRequest).open("POST",e,!0),o.onreadystatechange=function(){4==o.readyState&&200==o.status&&t(o.responseText)},o.setRequestHeader("Content-type","application/x-www-form-urlencoded"),o.send(n.join("&"))})}
  function observeAjaxCartActions(e){new PerformanceObserver(function(t){for(var n=t.getEntries(),r=0;r<n.length;r++)["xmlhttprequest","fetch"].includes(n[r].initiatorType)&&['=get_refreshed_fragments', 'add_to_cart'].some(p => n[r].name.includes(p))&&fetchCart(e)}).observe({entryTypes:["resource"]})};

  function fetchCart(adapter) {
    makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=cartData", { body })
      .then((response) => {
        var data = JSON.parse(response);
        setCartData(data, adapter);
      })
  }

  function setCartData(cartData, adapter) {
    Object.keys(cartData.avs).forEach((key, value) => {
      adapter.attr(`wp_${key}`, cartData.avs[key]);
    })
  }

  function setAssocData(assocData, adapter) {
    Object.keys(assocData).forEach((key) => {
      adapter.attr(`wp_${key}`, assocData[key]);
    })
  }

  var RuleHandler = {
    hasVisitorCartRules: (campaignMeta) => {
      return !!(campaignMeta.rules.visitorCart || campaignMeta.rules.visitorCartRevamp || campaignMeta.rules.visitorCartV3);
    },
    hasVisitorAttributeRule: (campaignMeta) => {
      return !!campaignMeta.rules.visitorAttribute;
    }
  }

  document.querySelector('html').addEventListener('optimonk#embedded-campaigns-init', function(e) {
    var campaignsData = e.parameters;

    if (!campaignsData.length) {
      return;
    }

    var adapter = window.OptiMonkEmbedded.Visitor.createAdapter();
    var hasCartRule = false;
    var hasAttributeRule = false;

    campaignsData.forEach((campaignMetaData) => {
      hasCartRule = hasCartRule || RuleHandler.hasVisitorCartRules(campaignMetaData);
      hasAttributeRule = hasAttributeRule || RuleHandler.hasVisitorAttributeRule(campaignMetaData);
    });

    setAssocData(pvData, adapter);

    if (hasCartRule) {
      observeAjaxCartActions(adapter);
      fetchCart(adapter);
    }

    if (hasAttributeRule) {
      makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=productData", { body })
        .then((response) => {
          var data = JSON.parse(response);
          setAssocData(data, adapter);
        })
    }
  });

  document.querySelector('html').addEventListener('optimonk#campaigns_initialized', function () {
    if (!OptiMonk.campaigns) {
      return;
    }

    var adapter = window.OptiMonk.Visitor.createAdapter();

    setAssocData(pvData, adapter);

    if (OptiMonk.campaigns.filter(campaign => campaign.hasVisitorAttributeRules()).length) {
      makePostRequest("//solutionpointbh.com/index.php?plugin=optimonk&action=productData", { body })
        .then((response) => {
          var data = JSON.parse(response);
          setAssocData(data, adapter);
        });
    }
  });
}());

        adapter.attr(`wp_${key}`, assocData[key]);
        })
    }

   function triggerEvent(element, eventName, parameters) {
        let event;
        if (document.createEvent) {
            event = document.createEvent('HTMLEvents');
            event.initEvent(eventName, true, true);
        } else if (document.createEventObject) {
            event = document.createEventObject();
            event.eventType = eventName;
        }

        event.eventName = eventName;
        event.parameters = parameters || {};

        if (element.dispatchEvent) {
            element.dispatchEvent(event);
        } else if (element.fireEvent) {
            element.fireEvent(`on${event.eventType}`, event);
        } else if (element[eventName]) {
            element[eventName]();
        } else if (element[`on${eventName}`]) {
            element[`on${eventName}`]();
        }
    };
    
    var adapter = OptiMonkEmbedded.Visitor.createAdapter();

    var orderData = null;
    

    if (orderData) {
        setAssocData(orderData, adapter);
    }

    console.log('[OM-plugin] visitor attributes updated');

    console.log('[OM-plugin] triggered event: optimonk#wc-attributes-updated');
    triggerEvent(document.querySelector('html'), 'optimonk#wc-attributes-updated');

});

if (window.WooDataForOM) {
